message:
fix(tui): repair 3 pre-existing test failures in dashboard, messages, timeline

- dashboard: scroll_up_disables_auto_follow — add events before testing scroll
  (empty event log causes clamp_scroll_offset to reset to 0)
- messages: contextual_actions JSON copy — use <= 1 instead of == 1 for
  selected_ids.len() so JSON tree actions appear with cursor-only selection
- timeline: commit_refresh_aggregates — remove incorrect refresh_errors >= 1
  assertion (get_timeline_commits returns Ok(empty) for missing slugs, not Err)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
